trigger: When preventing unsupported opencode coverage from being reported as complete

native_entry.projection_rule: Use only as a pointer to skills/software-project-governance/SKILL.md; do not duplicate workflow rules.

ask_user_question.evidence: opencode target-cwd E2E passed for reading governance state, but no native AskUserQuestion-equivalent tool is verified.
ask_user_question.degraded_mode: Use the outer host conversation for interaction boundaries and record degraded evidence.

sub_agent.evidence: opencode adapter has no verified sub-agent delegation path.
sub_agent.degraded_mode: Do not claim Producer-Reviewer separation from opencode runtime alone; require external reviewer evidence.

tool_calling.evidence: Real opencode target-cwd E2E passed for reading governance state, but no file-edit or command-tool governance E2E has been verified.
tool_calling.degraded_mode: Use opencode for read/load validation only; require external validation or future tool-use E2E before claiming native tool calling.

browser.evidence: No browser automation path is verified for the opencode adapter.
browser.degraded_mode: Mark browser validation blocked or run it from another host adapter.

mcp.evidence: MCP availability depends on opencode host configuration and has not been verified here.
mcp.degraded_mode: Use local scripts and record MCP unavailable when not configured.

git_hooks.evidence: Git hooks are repository-level controls and remain active for opencode-driven changes.

workflow_closure.evidence: opencode can load the workflow in target cwd, but interaction, sub-agent, browser, and MCP capabilities are not fully native.

runtime_e2e.evidence: Local opencode command returned version 1.15.5; provider/model preflight passed with supported DeepSeek models; real target-cwd opencode runtime E2E passed in the 90s timeout window.

target_cwd_e2e.evidence: Executed from project/e2e-test-project cwd and returned Test Project status with default-confirm permission mode.

provider_model_preflight.evidence: Preflight verified opencode CLI PATH/version and a supported DeepSeek model configuration without recording API key values.
provider_model_preflight.remediation: Use deepseek-v4-pro or deepseek-v4-flash; remove invalid suffixes such as deepseek-v4-pro[1m] and ANSI escape residue.

agent_runtime_e2e.command: python skills/software-project-governance/infra/verify_workflow.py agent-runtime-e2e --agent opencode --timeout 90; opencode run --dir . --format json ...
agent_runtime_e2e.evidence: Real opencode target-cwd E2E passed: opencode read project/e2e-test-project/AGENTS.md and .governance/plan-tracker.md and returned E2E_PLATFORM=opencode; E2E_AGENT=Coordinator; E2E_MODE=always-on x default-confirm.
